# forj

> forj lets you or your agent register a domain, configure GitHub, wire DNS, and spin up your deployment platform correctly from a single command.

## What is forj?

forj (forj-cli) lets you or your agent register a domain, configure GitHub, wire DNS, and spin up your deployment platform correctly from a single command.

## Install

```
npx forj-cli init <project-name>
```

The CLI is available on npm as `forj-cli`. No global install required.

## What forj provisions

1. **Domain registration** — Registers your domain via Namecheap. Pricing shown upfront (wholesale + ICANN fee). Payment via Stripe Checkout.
2. **GitHub organization and repository** — Creates a verified GitHub org and initializes a repository. Authenticated via GitHub OAuth Device Flow.
3. **Cloudflare DNS zone** — Creates a Cloudflare zone for your domain and configures nameservers automatically (Namecheap NS records pointed to Cloudflare).
4. **Vercel deployment (optional)** — Creates a Vercel project linked to the GitHub repo, adds your custom domain, and wires DNS records in Cloudflare. Requires GitHub to be provisioned (hard dependency).

All services are provisioned in parallel where possible, with real-time progress streamed to the CLI via SSE.

## How it works

1. Run `npx forj-cli init <project-name>`
2. Authenticate with GitHub (device flow) and Cloudflare (API token)
3. Search and select a domain
4. Pay for the domain via Stripe Checkout
5. forj provisions everything: domain, GitHub org + repo, Cloudflare DNS zone, nameserver wiring
6. Receive credentials and URLs — ready to build

## Architecture

- **CLI** (`forj-cli` on npm) — thin client using commander.js, inquirer, and SSE streaming
- **API** — Fastify server handling auth, payments, and orchestration
- **Workers** — BullMQ workers for domain, GitHub, Cloudflare, and Vercel provisioning
- **State machine** — each service tracks independent state, all workers are idempotent and resumable

## Key properties

- **Idempotent** — workers can be re-run safely; partial failures never corrupt state
- **Resumable** — if provisioning is interrupted, it picks up where it left off
- **Secure** — credentials are encrypted, delivered once to CLI, then purged from the server
- **Fast** — full infrastructure provisioned in under 2 minutes

## Pricing (agent-friendly)

forj has a single SKU: **$1.00 USD flat service fee per project**, plus domain cost at wholesale + ICANN fee. No tiers, no subscription, unlimited projects.

- Human-readable pricing: https://forj.sh/pricing.md
- Machine-readable JSON (public, no auth): https://api.forj.sh/v1/pricing
- Live per-domain quote (auth required): `POST /domains/check`

## Links

- Website: https://forj.sh
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/forj-cli
- GitHub: https://github.com/forj-sh
- Documentation: https://forj.sh/docs
- Pricing: https://forj.sh/pricing.md
